samples.xml_description: Implement a 16-bit divider in combinational logic. 16-bit dividend. 8-bit divisor. 16-bit quotient. 16-bit remainder. Bit width for the dividend and quotient. Bit width for the divisor. Implement division using subtraction and shifting. Use two always blocks to implement the division operation. The first always block updates the values of a_reg and b_reg with the values of A and B, respectively, and is triggered by any change in A or B. The second always block is a combinational block triggered by any change in A or B. Give the first always block as a "combinational logic" example and the second block as a "sequential logic" example. // Insert code here
